title: Handmaiden's staff
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|staff}}
[[File:Briannafightpose.jpg|thumb|right|Brianna wielding a Handmaiden's staff]]
The '''Handmaiden's staff''' was a close range melee weapon that was used by the [[Echani/Legends|Echani]] [[Handmaiden Sisters]] when in combat. The weapon was a double-sided staff that could collapse into its central handgrip for ease of carriage and concealment. In this respect, it resembled the [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed variant]] of the [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

The handmaiden [[Brianna]] owned one of these staffs; in her case it had been passed down from her father, [[Yusanis]], who was a powerful [[General/Legends|General]] and later [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] who was personally assassinated by [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the game, Brianna is the only one who can use it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
